Title: User Registration Process
Preconditions: Application is open and user is not logged in.
Test Data: Valid email: test@example.com, password: Test@123, confirm password: Test@123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Register activity.
2. Enter the email address and password.
3. Confirm the password.
4. Click on the submit button.
Expected Result: User is registered successfully and redirected to the login page.

Title: User Login Process
Preconditions: User has registered and is not logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login activity.
2. Enter the email address and password.
3. Click on the submit button.
Expected Result: User is logged in successfully and redirected to the home page.

Title: Invalid Login Attempt
Preconditions: User has registered and is not logged in.
Test Data: Registered email: test@example.com, incorrect password: Test@1234
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Login activity.
2. Enter the email address and incorrect password.
3. Click on the submit button.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Manage Newsletter Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Newsletter activity.
2. Subscribe to the newsletter.
3. Unsubscribe from the newsletter.
Expected Result: User subscription status changes accordingly.

Title: Handle Flash Activity
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Flash activity.
2. View the flash activity content.
Expected Result: Flash activity content is displayed correctly.

Title: Create Event
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: Event name: Test Event, date: 2023-10-10, time: 10:00 AM, location: Test Location
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Create event activity.
2. Fill in the event details.
3. Submit the event creation form.
Expected Result: Event is created successfully and added to the list of events.

Title: Join/View Event
Preconditions: User is logged in and there is at least one event available.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Join/View event activity.
2. Select an event to join/view.
3. Click on the join/view button.
Expected Result: User is able to join the event or view its details.

Title: Manage User Profile
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Data: New email: newtest@example.com, new password: NewTest@123
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Profile activity.
2. Update the email address and password.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: User profile information is updated successfully.

Title: Application Exit
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Exit activity.
2. Click on the exit button.
Expected Result: Application closes and user is logged out.

Title: Manage Newsletter Content
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to newsletter management.
Test Data: New newsletter content: Welcome to our community!
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Newsletter management activity.
2. Add new newsletter content.
3. Publish the newsletter.
Expected Result: New newsletter content is published successfully.

Title: Project Data Management
Preconditions: User is logged in and has access to project data management.
Test Data: New project data entry: Project X
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the Gestione di dati del progetto activity.
2. Add new project data entry.
3. Save the changes.
Expected Result: New project data entry is added successfully.

Title: Notification Center Functionality
Preconditions: User is logged in and has notifications enabled.
Test Steps:
1. Perform actions that trigger notifications (e.g., creating an event, joining an event).
2. Check the notification center for new notifications.
Expected Result: Notifications are displayed correctly in the notification center.

Title: No Notifications Available
Preconditions: User is logged in and has no pending notifications.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification center.
2. Check for any notifications.
Expected Result: Notification center displays a message indicating no notifications available.

Title: Clear All Notifications
Preconditions: User is logged in and has pending notifications.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the notification center.
2. Click on the clear all button.
Expected Result: All notifications are cleared from the notification center.

Title: Notification Center Accessibility
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to different sections of the application.
2. Access the notification center from each section.
Expected Result: Notification center is accessible from all sections of the application.

Title: Notification Center Error Handling
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Simulate server error while fetching notifications.
2. Check the notification center for error messages.
Expected Result: Error message is displayed if there is an issue fetching notifications.
